    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    G

    gauge - Variable in class ui.DashboardScreen
    Circular gauge visualising today's spending against the daily limit.
    GaugePanel - Class in util
    Custom painted panel that renders a circular arc gauge showing today's spending progress against the daily limit.
    GaugePanel(double, String, String) - Constructor for class util.GaugePanel
    Constructs a GaugePanel with an initial state.
    getActiveCycle() - Method in class app.App
    Returns the current active budget cycle from the database.
    getActiveCycle() - Method in class control.CycleManager
    Retrieves the current (most recent) budget cycle from the database.
    getAllCategories() - Method in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    Returns all categories stored in the database.
    getAllExpenses(int) - Method in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    Returns all expenses belonging to a specific budget cycle.
    getAmount() - Method in class domain.Expense
    Returns the monetary amount of this expense.
    getAuthManager() - Method in class app.App
    Returns the AuthManager instance for PIN and lockout operations.
    getBudgetCycle() - Method in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    Retrieves the first budget cycle found in the database.
    getCategories() - Method in class app.App
    Returns all expense categories.
    getCategories() - Method in class control.ExpenseManager
    Returns all categories stored in the database.
    getCategoryId() - Method in class domain.Expense
    Returns the category ID associated with this expense.
    getCycleId() - Method in class domain.Expense
    Returns the budget cycle ID this expense belongs to.
    getDailyLimit() - Method in class app.App
    Recalculates and returns the recommended daily spending limit for today, rounded up to the nearest EGP.
    getEndDate() - Method in class domain.BudgetCycle
    Returns the cycle end date.
    getExpenses() - Method in class app.App
    Returns all expenses for the active cycle.
    getExpensesByCategory(int) - Method in class app.App
    Returns all expenses for a specific category in the active cycle.
    getExpensesByCategory(int, int) - Method in class control.ExpenseManager
    Returns all expenses for a specific category within a cycle.
    getExpensesByCategory(int, int) - Method in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    Returns all expenses for a specific category within a budget cycle.
    getExpensesByCycle(int) - Method in class control.ExpenseManager
    Returns all expenses belonging to a given budget cycle.
    getIconResId() - Method in class domain.Category
    Returns the icon resource ID for this category.
    getId() - Method in class domain.BudgetCycle
    Returns the unique cycle ID.
    getId() - Method in class domain.Category
    Returns the unique ID of this category.
    getId() - Method in class domain.Expense
    Returns the unique ID of this expense.
    getInstance() - Static method in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    Returns the singleton instance, creating it on first call.
    getLimitCalculator() - Method in class app.App
    Returns the LimitCalculator instance for direct use by screens.
    getName() - Method in class domain.Category
    Returns the display name of this category.
    getPanel() - Method in class ui.BaseScreen
    Returns the root panel to be set as the JFrame content pane.
    getPin() - Method in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    Retrieves the stored hashed PIN from the database.
    getRemainingBalance() - Method in class domain.BudgetCycle
    Calculates the remaining unspent balance.
    getRemainingDays() - Method in class domain.BudgetCycle
    Calculates the number of days remaining until the cycle ends.
    getSecondsRemaining() - Method in class control.AuthManager
    Returns the number of seconds remaining in the current lockout.
    getSpentPercentage() - Method in class domain.BudgetCycle
    Calculates what percentage of the allowance has been spent.
    getStartDate() - Method in class domain.BudgetCycle
    Returns the cycle start date.
    getStatus() - Method in class domain.BudgetCycle
    Returns the current cycle status.
    getTableCellRendererComponent(JTable, Object, boolean, boolean, int, int) - Method in class util.AmountRenderer
    Returns a right-aligned bold label for the given amount value.
    getTableCellRendererComponent(JTable, Object, boolean, boolean, int, int) - Method in class util.CategoryPillRenderer
    Returns a centred pill badge component for the given category name.
    getTableCellRendererComponent(JTable, Object, boolean, boolean, int, int) - Method in class util.DefaultDarkRenderer
    Returns a left-padded white-text label for the given cell value.
    getTimestamp() - Method in class domain.Expense
    Returns the timestamp when this expense was recorded.
    getTodaySpent() - Method in class app.App
    Returns the total amount spent today in the active cycle.
    getTodaySpent(int) - Method in class control.ExpenseManager
    Returns the total amount spent today within the given cycle.
    getTodaySpent(int) - Method in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    Returns the sum of all expense amounts for today within a cycle.
    getTotalAllowance() - Method in class domain.BudgetCycle
    Returns the total allowance in EGP.
    getTotalSpent(int) - Method in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    Returns the cumulative total of all expenses in a cycle.
